Important Disclaimer PharmTrace is a pre-v1 research prototype for educational exploration only. It is not medical advice, not a clinical decision support system, and not professionally clinically reviewed. Source-linked evidence does not equal clinical validation. Always consult a qualified doctor or pharmacist before making any medication decision. No personal data is collected or stored; the MedCheck Engine runs locally in your browser.
